notes.sg-remote-sensing-remote-sensing-in-agri: This is a specific application of remote sensing, and 'satellite imagery' is a more general and relevant term for the parent topic.
notes.sg-remote-sensing-satellite-imagery: Relabeled to be more specific to the parent topic.
notes.sg-global-warming-effects-of-global-warm: This is too general. The other topics are more specific effects of global warming.
notes.sg-land-use-land-use-and-ecosystem-servi: This is a sub-topic of land management.
notes.sg-water-resource-water-resource-managem: This is a more general term than integrated water resource management and is likely a duplicate.
notes.sg-earth-system-earth-models-part: This is a duplicate of 'climate-carbon earth models' with '. part' appended.
notes.sg-earth-system-climate-carbon-earth-mod: This is a duplicate of 'climate-carbon earth models' with '. part' appended.
notes.sg-earth-system-coupled-climate-carbon-e: This is a duplicate of 'coupled climate-carbon earth models'.
notes.sg-earth-system-global-coupled-climate-c: This is a duplicate of 'coupled climate-carbon earth models'.
notes.sg-water-quality-urban-metabolism: This is a duplicate of urban density, which is more relevant to hydrology.
notes.sg-water-quality-index-of-biological-int: This is a duplicate of biological integrity, which is a more general and appropriate term.
notes.sg-water-quality-characteristics-of-natu: This is a duplicate of characteristics of natural water, which is more specific and relevant.
notes.sg-water-quality-urban-density: Relabeled to 'urban hydrology' for better specificity under the parent topic 'water quality'.
notes.sg-soil-science-water-flow: This is a sub-topic of hydraulic conductivity in the context of soil science and hydrology.
notes.sg-soil-water-soil-organic-matter: More specific than just 'soil organic matter'
notes.sg-soil-water-dns-root-zone: Too generic, likely refers to DNS (Domain Name System) rather than soil science
notes.sg-soil-water-pedotransfer-function: Key concept in soil hydrology modeling
